overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world action game set in an ancient Mediterranean shipyard at sunset. The player follows a child character in red clothing running through dusty construction grounds with large wooden vessels, transitioning from an open yard to a waterfront dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard construction yard with scattered wooden structures

events.description: child character transitions from walking to running forward through the yard
adult in green tunic passes close by the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: Child character in red clothing runs steadily through the dusty shipyard toward the central construction area, kicking up dust

notable_agents.action: adult in green tunic walks past the child from left to right, temporarily blocking the view

entered.detail: massive dark wooden vessel resting on scaffolding and supports, dominating the left side of the yard
open-air wooden shelter with tiled roof on the right side of the path
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the dirt ground
multi-story stone structures visible in the background beyond the shipyard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide dusty shipyard bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera follows a child in red running through the open dirt area toward a massive wooden ship under construction on the left. An adult in a green tunic passes by closely on the left, while wooden market stalls and scattered workers populate the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between large wooden ship and market structures

events.description: moving from open yard into narrow passage alongside the massive wooden ship
ground surface transitions from loose dirt to compacted stone paving near the ship hull

agents.ego_description: Child continues running alongside the massive wooden ship, navigating between the hull and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: worker in dark clothing walks toward the camera along the side of the ship

entered.detail: large wooden wheel assemblies and rollers used for moving ships on land
tall rectangular stone tower becoming visible behind the ship structure

segments.scene_description: The child runs into a narrower passage between the massive wooden ship hull on the left and wooden market structures on the right. Large wooden ship wheels and construction materials litter the ground. A worker walks toward the camera as the path transitions from dirt to stone paving. The stone tower becomes visible in the background beyond the ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway approaching the harbor water

events.description: emerging from alongside the ship into the open dock area with harbor water visible ahead
entering shadow of wooden dock structure while approaching the bright water surface

agents.ego_description: Child slows to a walk as they approach the stone dock, moving toward the water where ships are moored

notable_agents.action: man standing near the stern of the wooden ship watching the child pass by

entered.detail: calm blue water of the harbor becoming visible between the wooden structures
wooden sailing vessel with distinctive red sail moored at the dock ahead
stone and wooden planked dock walkway leading down to the water

segments.scene_description: The child emerges from the narrow ship passage onto a stone-paved dock. The harbor water becomes visible ahead, with an ancient trireme featuring a red sail moored in the distance. The ground transitions from dirt to stone tiles as the camera moves under wooden dock structures. A man stands near the ship's stern watching as the child approaches the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty shipyard that gradually opens onto a stone-paved waterfront dock. It begins in a wide, sun-drenched dirt area where the camera trails a child in red running past market stalls and workers toward a massive wooden ship under construction. As the child enters a narrower passage, the environment shifts from open ground to a cluttered corridor of ship wheels and construction materials, with a stone tower emerging in the distance. The scene then expands as the path transitions from dirt to stone paving, leading the child out from beneath wooden dock structures. Finally, the camera reveals the harbor water and a moored trireme with a red sail as the child approaches the waterfront.
